microsoft_ft: Architected Azure's recovery validation platform from a **2-person operation** into a scalable, self-service system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and delivering **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **end-to-end delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable execution across engineering orgs.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months, surfacing critical hardware defects, and establishing a new continuous validation model adopted across the platform.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, advising VP- and C-level stakeholders throughout.
Built an **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly scaling solution delivery without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **platform adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows, conducting live demos and enablement sessions that activated 14 key Azure engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing integration gaps and securing stakeholder buy-in to prioritize **intent-based YAML generation** as a core platform capability.

Accelerated technical onboarding by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, reducing information lookup time by 83% across engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch timelines by 28% by architecting a unified automation prioritization framework and driving cross-functional alignment across 140+ engineering teams.

Defined a scalable delivery model for region launches by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual toil** per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.
Enabled executive decision-making on **automation investment** by engineering a Power BI dashboard that surfaced operational toil patterns and prioritized high-impact gaps across 140+ teams.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders end-to-end.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to accelerate delivery across cross-functional workstreams.

Partnered with Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, reducing deployment cycle time by 25% and creating a repeatable integration pattern adopted across the robotics software platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM-driven process that improved conversion and stakeholder trust.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence, Google profile, and top-of-funnel messaging to align with buyer intent.
Delivered a profitability framework to leadership by analyzing **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and connecting pricing decisions directly to measurable business outcomes.

skills_priority: Solutions Architecture & Pre-Sales: API integrations, proof-of-concept design, solution scoping, demos
AI & Automation: AI agents, LLM-powered tools, workflow automation, semantic search, prompt engineering, RAG
Technical: Azure, APIs, CI/CD, distributed systems, YAML, Python, SQL, Power BI
Platform & Delivery: Scalable frameworks, playbooks, integration patterns, self-service models
Stakeholder & Commercial: Executive communication, trusted advisor, cross-functional execution, OKRs
Program & Product: Technical Program Management, roadmapping, Agile/Scrum, product requirements
